GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [numwait@1 DESC, s_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[numwait@1 DESC, s_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[s_name@0 as s_name, count(*)@1 as numwait]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[s_name], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_name@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[s_name], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=LeftAnti, on=[(l_orderkey@1, l_orderkey@0)], filter=l_suppkey@1 != l_suppkey@0, projection=[0]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=LeftSemi, on=[(l_orderkey@1, l_orderkey@0)], filter=l_suppkey@1 != l_suppkey@0
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, s_nationkey@1)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=n_name@1 = SAUDI ARABIA, projection=[0]
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_nationkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(o_orderkey@0, l_orderkey@2)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4]
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                            GpuFilterExec: predicate=o_orderstatus@1 = F, projection=[0]
                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_suppkey@0, l_suppkey@1)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4]
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_suppkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                                                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_receiptdate@3 > l_commitdate@2, projection=[0, 1]
                                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_receiptdate@3 > l_commitdate@2, projection=[0, 1]
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
  GpuSortExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                    GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                    GpuFilterExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                                        GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                    GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                                            GpuFilterExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                                              GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44
                                                    GpuScanExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                                    GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40

                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                          GpuScanExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                    GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                        GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
